mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_enrollment SET monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId}, monitored_at = NOW(), follow_up_deadline = COALESCE(follow_up_deadline, (enrolled_at::date + INTERVAL '180 days')::date) WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status = 'active'

UPDATE follow_up_patient_profile SET monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId}, monitored_at = NOW(), follow_up_deadline = COALESCE(follow_up_deadline, (enrolled_at::date + INTERVAL '180 days')::date) WHERE register_id = #{registerId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, register_id AS "registerId", department_id AS "departmentId", from_employee_id AS "fromEmployeeId", to_employee_id AS "toEmployeeId", reason, status, admin_note AS "adminNote", reviewed_by AS "reviewedBy", reviewed_at AS "reviewedAt", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM follow_up_monitoring_transfer_request WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_monitoring_transfer_request SET status = #{status}, admin_note = #{adminNote}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_monitoring_transfer_request WHERE status = 'pending'
AND department_id = #{departmentId}
